title: Vexi's LowFire Pack
description: A pack that reduces vanilla fire animation, making it lower and less visible on the screen.
body:
# Low Fire Pack

This pack reduces the vanilla fire animation, making it lower and less visible.

## Compatibility
- Minecraft Java Edition 1.19+

## Installation
1. Download the pack (.zip).
2. Move it to the `resourcepacks` folder.
3. Enable it in Minecraft settings.

## Support & Feedback
Join my **[Discord Server]([https://discord.gg/2YSGtYF944)** for support, bug reports, or feedback.
